name: Douyin · 文章发布（Article Publish）
description: 全流程抖音文章发布：上传头图 → 裁剪 → 填标题 → 插入正文 → 等CDN → 发布。需要先登录 creator.douyin.com。

auth.hint: 请先在浏览器登录 creator.douyin.com，并确保 Chrome 已启动 --remote-debugging-port=9222。

content_html.description: 文章正文 HTML（含 标签）。建议将 HTML 写入文件，用 @file.html 引用。

steps.script: (() => { const b = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].find(b => b.innerText?.trim() === '确定' && b.offsetWidth > 0); if (!b) return 'no_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(b).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && b[pk]?.onClick) { b[pk].onClick(); return 'react_clicked'; } return 'no_onClick'; })()

(() => { const ti = document.querySelector('input[placeholder*="标题"]'); if (!ti) return 'no_title_input'; const setter = Object.getOwnPropertyDescriptor(HTMLInputElement.prototype, 'value').set; setter.call(ti, window.__flow_vars.title); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', {bubbles: true})); ti.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', {bubbles: true})); return 'ok'; })()

(() => { const e = document.querySelector('.editor-DoqDrA'); if (!e) return 'no_editor'; const f = Object.keys(e).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactFiber')); if (!f) return 'no_fiber'; let c = e[f], ed = null; for (let i = 0; i < 20 && c; i++) { const s = c.memoizedState; if (s) { let h = s; while (h) { const v = h.memoizedState; if (v && typeof v === 'object' && v.editor && v.editor.commands && typeof v.editor.commands.insertContent === 'function') { ed = v.editor; break; } h = h.next; } } if (ed) break; c = c.return; } if (!ed) return 'no_tiptap'; ed.commands.clearContent(); ed.commands.insertContent(window.__flow_vars.content_html); return 'ok'; })()

(async () => { for (let i = 0; i < 60; i++) { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const imgs = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror')?.querySelectorAll('img') || []; let cdn = 0, total = imgs.length; imgs.forEach(im => { if (!im.src.startsWith('blob:') && !im.src.startsWith('data:')) cdn++; }); if (total > 0 && cdn >= total) return JSON.stringify({cdn, total, ready: true}); } return JSON.stringify({ready: false}); })()

(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(e => e.innerText?.trim() === '发布' && e.offsetWidth > 0); const btn = btns[btns.length - 1]; if (!btn) return 'no_btn'; const pk = Object.keys(btn).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && btn[pk]?.onClick) { btn[pk].onClick(); return 'clicked'; } return 'no_onClick'; })()

(() => { const btns = [...document.querySelectorAll('button')].filter(e => e.innerText?.trim() === '发布' && e.offsetWidth > 0); const popup = btns.find(b => { const r = b.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.y > 500; }); if (!popup) return 'no_popup'; const pk = Object.keys(popup).find(k => k.startsWith('__reactProps')); if (pk && popup[pk]?.onClick) { popup[pk].onClick(); return 'popup_clicked'; } return 'popup_no_onClick'; })()
